data.title: Banco Itaú Chile Announces First Quarter 2026 Management Commentary
data.description: Today, in Santiago, Chile, Banco Itaú Chile (SSE: ITAUCL) released its Management Commentary for the first quarter ending on March 31, 2026. The report provides a detailed analysis of the company's performance during this period. For further information, the full report can be accessed on their website.

data.title: Mastercard's Core Business Is Booming, And Its Stablecoin Ambitions Just Got Louder
data.description: Mastercard Inc. (NYSE: MA) reported its first-quarter earnings exceeding expectations. The company announced adjusted earnings per share of $4.60, surpassing the anticipated $4.40. Net revenue totaled $8.398 billion, beating the projected $8.250 billion. The growth was driven by a 12% increase in payment network net revenue, 8% on a currency-neutral basis, linked to a 7% rise in gross dollar volume to $2.7 trillion. Cross-border volume showed a 13% increase, and switched transactions rose by 9%. The uptick also included a 23% rise in rebates and incentives, driven by increased volumes and new customer deals. Additionally, value-added services and solutions revenue spiked by 22%, 18% currency-neutral.
Effective fed funds rate 3.64% April 29th vs 3.64% April 28th.

data.title: Encore Technologies Expands Partnership with Greenfoot Energy Solutions to Advance HYGN Retrofit Applications Across Industrial Markets
data.description: Encore Technologies has announced an expansion of its partnership with Greenfoot Energy Solutions to further develop HYGN retrofit applications within industrial markets. This move is intended to accelerate the adoption of hydrogen-based solutions in industries, leveraging Greenfoot's expertise in sustainable energy solutions. The partnership will focus on deploying HYGN retrofit applications across a variety of industrial sectors, with an emphasis on maximizing energy efficiency and reducing emissions. This collaboration is expected to drive significant growth in the adoption of hydrogen technology, with an estimated increase of up to 30% in the industrial market segment.

data.title: WidePoint Sets First Quarter 2026 Conference Call for Thursday, May 14, 2026, at 4:30 p.m. ET
data.description: WidePoint Corporation has scheduled a conference call on May 14, 2026, at 4:30pm Eastern Time to review its financial performance for the first quarter concluding on March 31, 2026.

data.title: Broadcom Accelerates Multi-Gig Broadband with Optimized 10G PON and Wi-Fi 8 Solutions for Mass Market
data.description: Broadcom Inc., a prominent technology company listed on NASDAQ as AVGO, revealed on April 30, 2026, its latest innovations in the form of the fourth generation of Wi-Fi 8 chips alongside an advanced 10G PON chip in Palo Alto, Calif. These developments further solidify Broadcom's position as a global leader in technology, specializing in semiconductor and infrastructure software solutions. The announcement showcased the company's commitment to enhancing broadband services by leveraging IEEE 802.11bn benefits for service providers in fiercely competitive markets with restricted average revenue per user (ARPU) growth. Through the integration of 10G PON and Wi-Fi 8 technologies, broadband operators now have the capability to offer efficient, fiber-based connectivity solutions at a large scale, facilitating a seamless transition from outdated copper and cable technologies to modernized services.

data.title: Aduro Clean Technologies to Participate in Industry and Investor Conferences in May 2026
data.description: In May 2026, Aduro will participate in various international industry and investor gatherings to showcase advancements in its Pilot Plant, First-of-a-Kind (FOAK) projects, and efforts toward commercialization. These events will offer valuable exposure to a wide audience, emphasizing the company's commitment to innovation and growth in the sector. Attendees can expect to learn about the latest developments and achievements in these key areas, reflecting Aduro's strategic focus on driving forward progress in its operations. This engagement signifies a significant opportunity for stakeholders to gain insights into the company's milestones and future plans, reinforcing Aduro's presence and reputation within the global market.

data.title: Cathie Wood's ARK Bets $39 Million On Robinhood: What Is Going On?
data.description: Investment firm ARK Invest recently made significant moves in the market. On Wednesday, ARK Invest purchased $39.4 million worth of shares in Robinhood (NASDAQ: HOOD) following a 13.2% decline in the stock due to underwhelming earnings. Concurrently, ARK Invest sold $6.1 million of its Bitcoin (CRYPTO: BTC) ETF. The purchase of Robinhood shares was made at a price of $71, with ARK Invest acquiring a total of 553,892 shares of Robinhood across its ARK Innovation, Next Generation Internet, and Fintech Innovation ETFs. Additionally, the firm sold 243,147 shares of the ARK 21Shares Bitcoin ETF from its ARKW and ARKF funds. Robinhood now holds significant positions in ARK's portfolios, being the sixth-largest holding in ARK Innovation with a 4.3% weighting valued at $275.3 million, the fourth-largest in ARK Next Generation Internet at 4.6% worth $75.6 million, and the sixth-largest in ARK Fintech Innovation at 4.4% valued at $36.1 million. For further details, the complete article is accessible on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Stratford School Celebrates Inaugural Graduating Class of Stratford Preparatory Blackford
data.description: In a groundbreaking achievement for Silicon Valley High School, 65 graduating seniors have secured spots at prestigious universities across the nation. This marks a historic milestone for the school, located in San Jose, California. The seniors, part of the first graduating class, are set to embark on their academic journeys at top-tier institutions, showcasing the school's commitment to academic excellence. Silicon Valley High School is under the umbrella of Stratford School, a prominent private school network with over 30 campuses catering to families in the Bay Area. The success of these 65 students highlights the school's dedication to providing quality education and preparing students for higher education opportunities.

data.title: RNR Tire Express to Debut in Massachusetts with New Franchise Agreement
data.description: In the summer of 2026, Brockton will witness the grand opening of the first location in the state of a prominent franchise retailer dealing in tires and custom wheels. RNR Tire Express (RNR), recognized as the top franchise retailer in the nation for these automotive essentials, will set foot in Boston. This significant development was announced on April 30, 2026. The new location is set to showcase the diverse offerings of tires and custom wheels that RNR is known for, marking a new chapter in the automotive retail industry in Brockton with its high-quality products and services.

data.title: Members Trust Company Named 2026 CUSO of the Year by National Association of Credit Union Service Organizations
data.description: In Tampa, Florida on April 30, 2026, Members Trust Company (MTC), which is the first trust and investment management firm in the U.S. owned entirely by credit unions, revealed that it has been honored as the CUSO of the Year for 2026 by the National Association of Credit Union Service.

data.title: Heritage Capital Group Welcomes Phil Porter, Jr. as Principal
data.description: In Jacksonville, Florida on April 30, 2026, Heritage Capital Group, Inc. (Heritage), a firm specializing in investment banking and financial advisory services for middle-market companies in the U.S. and worldwide, disclosed the selection of Phil Porter, Jr. as a Principal for its Jacksonville office.

data.title: Fenceworks Expands into Texas with Acquisition of T-Bar Fence
data.description: Today, on April 30, 2026, in Riverside, California, Fenceworks, a major player in fencing installation and distribution and owned by Gemspring Capital, revealed its latest development. The company has successfully acquired T-Bar Fence, a renowned service provider for fencing, gate, and sport court installations. This acquisition marks a significant move within the industry and showcases Fenceworks' commitment to expanding its business operations.
